case_title: KATHERINE WHELAN VS. POMPODORI, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA NATI et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF WHELAN, KATHERINE AS TO DEFENDANT POMPODORI, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION DBA NATI ONAL CONCESSIONS COMPANY HELLER-ISRAEL, DEBORAH JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
